image:image.image:title: HPLC Column Cabinet
image:image.image:caption: SS 304 grade cabinet with drawer storage for HPLC columns.

image:image.image:title: Lockers
image:image.image:caption: SS 304 lockers for cleanroom garment and personal storage.

image:image.image:title: Shoe Locker
image:image.image:caption: Dedicated shoe storage locker for gowning areas.

image:image.image:title: Sterile Garment Cupboard
image:image.image:caption: Storage cupboard for sterile garments in controlled environments.

image:image.image:title: Cupboard
image:image.image:caption: General purpose SS storage cupboard for pharma facilities.

image:image.image:title: Cross Over Benches
image:image.image:caption: SS cross-over benches for cleanroom entry/exit zones.

image:image.image:title: In Process Container
image:image.image:caption: SS containers for in-process material handling.

image:image.image:title: Intermediate Bulk Container
image:image.image:caption: IBC for bulk intermediate storage and transfer.

image:image.image:title: Barrel
image:image.image:caption: SS storage barrels for pharma raw materials.

image:image.image:title: Tank Vessels Canister
image:image.image:caption: Storage tanks, vessels and canisters for pharma applications.

image:image.image:title: Dies Punch Cabinet
image:image.image:caption: Secure storage cabinet for tablet dies and punches.

image:image.image:title: IPQC Table
image:image.image:caption: In-process quality control inspection table.

image:image.image:title: Dinning Tables
image:image.image:caption: SS dining tables for canteen and break areas.

image:image.image:title: Working Table
image:image.image:caption: General purpose SS working table for production areas.

image:image.image:title: Sink Units
image:image.image:caption: SS sink units for washing and cleaning areas.

image:image.image:title: Revolving Stool
image:image.image:caption: Height-adjustable revolving stool for workstations.

image:image.image:title: Stool
image:image.image:caption: Fixed height SS stool for production areas.

image:image.image:title: Chair Stools
image:image.image:caption: Ergonomic SS chairs and stools with back support.

image:image.image:title: Rack
image:image.image:caption: SS storage racks for material and equipment.

image:image.image:title: Closed Type Trolley
image:image.image:caption: Enclosed SS trolley for secure material transport.

image:image.image:title: Weight Box Trolley
image:image.image:caption: Trolley designed for weight box and standard weight transport.

image:image.image:title: Tray Trolley
image:image.image:caption: Multi-tier tray trolley for material handling.

image:image.image:title: Sieves Inspection Trolley
image:image.image:caption: Mobile trolley for sieve inspection and storage.

image:image.image:title: Platform Trolley
image:image.image:caption: Flat platform trolley for heavy load transport.

image:image.image:title: Multipurpose Trolley
image:image.image:caption: Versatile SS trolley for various material handling needs.

image:image.image:title: Linen Trolley
image:image.image:caption: Trolley for soiled and clean linen handling.

image:image.image:title: Drum Trolley
image:image.image:caption: Drum handling trolley for safe drum transport.

image:image.image:title: Cage Trolley
image:image.image:caption: Cage-style trolley for bulk material transport.

image:image.image:title: Mopping Trolley
image:image.image:caption: SS mopping trolley for facility cleaning.

image:image.image:title: Scoop
image:image.image:caption: SS scoops for powder and granule handling.

image:image.image:title: Soap Dispenser
image:image.image:caption: Wall-mounted SS soap dispenser for wash areas.

image:image.image:title: Pendent
image:image.image:caption: SS pendent for gowning and wash areas.

image:image.image:title: Gloves Box
image:image.image:caption: Dispenser box for cleanroom gloves.

image:image.image:title: Rejection Box
image:image.image:caption: SS rejection box for QC rejected products.

image:image.image:title: Oil Can
image:image.image:caption: SS oil dispensing can for lubrication.

image:image.image:title: Teflon Hammer
image:image.image:caption: Teflon-headed hammer for delicate equipment work.

image:image.image:title: Dustbin
image:image.image:caption: SS foot-operated dustbins for clean areas.

image:image.image:title: Tool Box
image:image.image:caption: SS tool box for maintenance and production tools.

image:image.image:title: Spatula
image:image.image:caption: SS spatula for powder and paste handling.

image:image.image:title: Powder Sampler
image:image.image:caption: SS powder sampler for representative sampling.

image:image.image:title: Mug
image:image.image:caption: SS mugs for sampling and laboratory use.

image:image.image:title: Liquid Sampler
image:image.image:caption: SS liquid sampler for container sampling.

image:image.image:title: Drain Trap
image:image.image:caption: SS drain trap for sink and floor drain applications.

image:image.image:title: Ampoule Tray
image:image.image:caption: SS tray for ampoule handling and inspection.

image:image.image:title: Ladder
image:image.image:caption: SS ladders for facility maintenance access.

image:image.image:title: Conveyor
image:image.image:caption: SS conveyors for packing and material transfer lines.
